title: citronella vitiensis
intro: Citronella vitiensis, also known as the Fiji lemongrass, is a species of lemongrass native to the Pacific island of Fiji. It is a perennial grass with a strong citrus scent, used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and prevent the growth of bacteria and fungi. Citronella vitiensis can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and infusions, which are used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
